word: G4763 - στρηνιάω - strēniáō - stray-nee-ah'-o - Live deliciously

sections.paragraph:
- Original: στρηνιάω

- Transliteration: Streniao

- Phonetic: stray-nee-ah'-o

- Definition:

1. to be wanton, to live luxuriously

- Origin: from a presumed derivative of G4764

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From a presumed derivative of G4764; to be luxurious: - live deliciously.
